CHALLENGE AGAINST WOOLARD FILED BY PLAINTIFF GHIGLIOTTI JR., JEROME J. ,APC

LAW AND MOTION 302, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF JEROME GHIGLIOTTI'S MTN TO SET ASIDE DISMISSAL IS OFF CALENDAR. PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO PROVIDE COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS IN COMPLIANCE WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. THE COURT ORDERED PLAINTIFF TO PROVIDE THOSE PAPERS ON FEBRUARY 11, 2013 AND MARCH 25, 2013, BUT PLAINTIFF FAILED TO COMPLY WITH THOSE ORDERS. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN #6185.

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF JEROME GHIGLIOTTI'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DISMISSAL IS CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO MARCH 25, 2013 TO GIVE PLAINTIFF THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. PLAINTIFF MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF HIS MOVING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN FEBRUARY 12, 2013 AT 4 PM, OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.

calendar.matters:
Mtn To Set Aside Dismissal
Off Calendar Apr-17-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF JEROME GHIGLIOTTI'S Mtn To Set Aside Dismissal is off calendar. Plaintiff has failed to provide courtesy copies of the moving papers in compliance with Local Rule 2.6B. The Court ordered plaintiff to provide those papers on February 11, 2013 and March 25, 2013, but plaintiff failed to comply with those orders. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.

Mtn To Set Aside Dismissal
Off Calendar Mar-25-2013 Continued To Apr-17-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF JEROME GHIGLIOTTI's motion To Set Aside Dismissal is Continued to April 17, 2013 to give moving party the opportunity to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.

Mtn To Set Aside Dismissal
Off Calendar Feb-11-2013 Continued To Mar-25-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF JEROME GHIGLIOTTI'S motion To Set Aside Dismissal is Continued on the court's own motion to March 25, 2013 to give Plaintiff the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Plaintiff must deliver courtesy copies of his moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than February 12, 2013 at 4 pm, or the motion will be denied. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-20-2012 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance for plaintiff. Appearance by JUSTIN A. GOODMAN, Esq. for defendant. Defendant's oral motion to dismiss the case is granted. Court ordered case dismissed. Proceedings not reported. (610)
